entity.name: AbstractApplicationTrackingHistoryItem
entity.description: The base class of all the types of application tracking history items. With application tracking history itens we can know : when the candidate has applied on a requisition, when and what has changed in his personnal informations, when and what has change on his application, when and what was the progression of the candidate during the hiring process.

relation.name: Candidate
relation.description: The candidate to which the application tracking histoty item is related to.

relation.name: ProfileInformation
relation.description: The profile information on which the tracking history item applies to.

entity.name: AddressBookHistory
entity.description: This class represents the history address where the candidate has lived.

field.name: AddressLine1
field.description: This field holds the address part 1 of the candidate.

field.name: AddressLine2
field.description: This field holds the address part 2 of the candidate.

field.name: City
field.description: This field hold the value for the candidate city, since the rslocation doesn't constains the city.

field.name: County
field.description: This field holds the county, if applicable where the candidate lives.

field.name: DisplaySequence
field.description: This field determines the order to display this address book history among the candidate's address history.

field.name: FromDate
field.description: This field holds the date from where the candidate lives.

field.name: PostalCode
field.description: This field holds the postal code of the candidate.

field.name: ToDate
field.description: This field holds the to date where the candidate lives.

relation.name: Location
relation.description: Contains the place of residence location for the address book. Since the field value can't contain the city, we have a city field available also to be more specific.

relation.name: Type
relation.description: The address type : Current, Previous or secondary.

entity.name: AddressType
entity.description: This is a lookup class. It contains the possible values that can be given to the type of address for an AddressBookHistory.

entity.name: AdminEntityStatus
entity.description: Administration entity status

field.name: Code
field.description: A unique, alphanumeric code uniquely identifying a given status.

entity.name: ApplicationCertification
entity.description: Application certifications are the certifications that the candidate has entered in the context of the application.

field.name: DateReceived
field.description: This field holds the date received certification.

field.name: DisplaySequence
field.description: This field determines the order to display this application certification among the candidate's application certifications.

field.name: ExpirationDate
field.description: This field holds the expiration date of the certifications..

field.name: IssuingOrganization
field.description: This field holds the certification issuing organization.

field.name: No
field.description: this is the key field

field.name: NumberId
field.description: This field holds the certification ID enter by the candidate.

field.name: OtherCertificationName
field.description: This field hold the value for the other certification name if it is not part of the list.

relation.name: Certification
relation.description: The certification

relation.name: Location
relation.description: This relation hold the location where the candidate received the certifications.

relation.name: ProfileInformation
relation.description: This relation define the application related to the certifications.

entity.name: ApplicationMedium
entity.description: This entity is a lookup containing the information on how did we learn about the candidate for a specific application.

field.name: Code
field.description: Public identifier of the application medium.

entity.name: ApplicationText
entity.description: Contains all the text datas that a candidate can provide. It contains datas like the cover letter, pasted resume, career objectives and additional informations. removeCheckOnDelete=true)

field.name: AdditionalInformation
field.description: The additional information that the candidate provided.

field.name: CareerObjective
field.description: The career objectives that the candidate provided.

field.name: CoverLetter
field.description: The cover letter that the candidate provided.

field.name: PastedResume
field.description: The pated resume that the candidate provided.

relation.name: ProfileInformation

field.description: This field holds the city of birth of the candidate.

field.name: MotherMaidenName
field.description: This field holds the mother maiden name of the candidate.

field.name: Name
field.description: Name of the Administration Entity (mutlilingual)

relation.name: Status
relation.description: Reference to the Administration Entity status of the administration entity

entity.name: BaseComposite
entity.description: Generic entity to provide a tree structure data

field.name: Code
field.description: Unique identifier providing a meaningful key

field.name: Level
field.description: Indicates the level where the composite is located in the tree structure. The level of the root of the tree structure is 0. It's a read-only calculated field.

field.name: Name
field.description: Name of the composite (mutlilingual)

field.name: Number
field.description: Unique identifier generated by the system

relation.name: Children
relation.description: Reference to the children of a specific composite. This list of composite is read-only

relation.name: Sequence
relation.description: Sequence of the composite

relation.name: Status
relation.description: Reference to the Administration Entity Status of the composite

entity.name: BaseCompositeSequence
entity.description: Generic entity to provide a way to personalize sorting of the tree structure elements

field.name: Sequence
field.description: Specified sorting order, overriding the default sorting order

entity.name: BaseHierarchy
entity.description: BaseHierarchy is an abstract class providing an hierarchical tree structure.

field.name: Level
field.description: The level of the element in the hierarchical tree structure from the root. The root level in the tree structure is 0. The deeper the element is in the hierachy, the higher the level will be.

entity.name: BaseMultilingualAdminEntity
entity.description: This class serves as a common ancestor for all multilingual, administrable entities. It defines fields and methods that should be common across all those entities.

field.name: Active
field.description: Indicates if the given language is active (or usable). Inactive languages are seen only when administering an entity, and are not considered usable throughout the system.

field.name: Base
field.description: Indicates if the given language is the base language for this entity. The entity must have a base language, and that language must also be supported by the entity.

entity.name: BaseMultilingualEntity
entity.description: This class serves as a common ancestor for all multilingual entities. It defines fields and methods that should be common across all those entities.

field.name: Active
field.description: Indicates if the given language is active (or usable). Inactive languages are seen only when administering an entity, and are not considered usable throughout the system.

field.name: Base
field.description: Indicates if the given language is the base language for this entity. The entity must have a base language, and that language must also be supported by the entity.

entity.name: BasePool
entity.description: BasePool is the generic definition of an extensible and reusable solution. A pool identifies a list of items (Persons, Candidates, Employees, Goals, Requisitions, etc) and provides actions on it. Assign development activities, match pool members to requisitions, plan and forecast resources availability are some examples of usages of pools.

field.name: Code
field.description: The unique identifier of this entity.

field.name: CreationDate
field.description: This field contains the date at which the pool was created.

field.name: Description
field.description: This field contains a brief description of what the pool is for. This field is multilingual.

field.name: LastModifiedDate
field.description: Holds the last modification date of the entity.

field.name: Name
field.description: This field contains the name of the pool. This field is multilingual.

field.name: Number
field.description: This is the unique internal identifier of a pool.

relation.name: PoolOwner
relation.description: This relation contains the user that has created the pool. The owner is the user that creates the pool and manage it. He can comments the pool, add user that can add-remove-comment items in the pool. The owner can add-remove-comment items in the pool.

relation.name: PoolUsers
relation.description: This relations contains the list of the users that can manipulate the pool. They can add-remove-comment, items in the pool.

entity.name: BaseRole
entity.description: The role represent the role of an actor; it can be a system role or a user defined role.

entity.name: BusinessOrganization
entity.description: A business organization is a unit of the company. It has a common set of goals within a business plan. A business organization is an aggregated view of the HR organization structure. In some cases, the business organization structure may be the exact replica of the HR organization structure. Structure should be limited to 2 or 3 levels to keep it simple. - Business unit - Division

field.name: CustomerID
field.description: The Business Organization internal identifier specified by the customer. Used for referencing a business organization identifier known in another external system for integration purposes.

relation.name: Parent
relation.description: Reference to the parent of a specific composite

entity.name: BusinessOrganizationLevel
entity.description: Business Organization specific level.

entity.name: BusinessOrganizationSequence
entity.description: Business organization specific sequence.

entity.name: Candidate
entity.description: Candidate is one of the most important aspect in the recruitment process. A candidate is an individual about whom a customer possesses relevant information, such as his/her Profile and Personal Info. This information may be acquired as follows: - Most often, the candidate provides it when he/she applies on a position using a requisition or through unsolicited manner. This can be done using an electronic application or through regular mail. - In some cases, the candidate may not have provided the some information. The candidate can be an individual that do not work for the company or it can be an internal employee.

field.name: ActiveApplicationCount
field.description: This field contains the number of applications that the candidate has. This field is incrementd when the candidate apply on a requisition and the cie setting DisplayIncompleteApplication is set to 1. If the later cie setting is set to 0, the count will be incremented only when the application become completed.

field.name: Address
field.description: The first part of the personal address of the candidate.

field.name: Address2
field.description: The second part of the personal address of the candidate.

field.name: Anonymous
field.description: Indicates if the candidate wants to remain anonymous. An anonymous candidate has not gave his firstname and lastname.

field.name: AvailabilityDate
field.description: The date at which the candidate will be able to start to work.

field.name: Birthday
field.description: The date on which the candidate is born.

field.name: CHiringProcessStatus
field.description: This field is read-only and it is for internal uses. This field indicate if the candidate has more than one active application (=2) or if the candidate has only one active application (=1). This field is never persisted.

field.name: City
field.description: The city of the personnal adress of the candidate.

field.name: ConfirmedAccount
field.description: Flag to confirm whether this CSUser account is confirmed or not. Only when the candidate himself/herself create or update the user account, it is considered as confirmed acccount.

field.name: CreationDate
field.description: The date when the candidate has been created.

field.name: CSWLatestDate
field.description: The date on which the candidate advance in the hiring process for the last time.

field.name: DisqualifierResultDate
field.description: The general profile disqualifier result date of the candidate (knockout status). The date when the candidate disqualifier result has been evaluated according to its answers to the general company disqualification questions. A corresponding disqualifier result is set.

field.name: EmailAddressValidated
field.description: Flag to indicate if email address was validated. Will be FALSE unless the app validated the email address. This field can be access by any application that wants to indicate if a candidate's email address has been validated. Value should NOT be set directly, unless as part of the email validation feature (TEC-9954).

field.name: HasReferrered
field.description: Indicate if the candidate has referred another candidate.

field.name: Hourly
field.description: This private field is used to optimized batch process on candidate. The concept of "Hourly candididate" does not exist in taleo system. This field is managed with the following algorithm: Yes: When he applied only on Hourly Requisition(s). No: From the moment a candidate applies on a professionnal or campus requisition, or when he submits his profile. This field is populated by trigger. Do not import this field.

field.name: IdentificationMissing
field.description: This field is read-only. It indicate if the candidate has NOT given his firstname and his lastname and he had not indicated that he whiches to be anonymous when he entered his personnal informations. This field is never persisted.

field.name: InclusiveLastModifiedDate
field.description: This field contains the last date that a modification has been made on the candidate. Ether on his personnal or his progression in the hiring process, or any other changes.

field.name: InHiringProcess
field.description: Indicate if the candidate is involved in at least one hiring process on a requisition. The field activeApplicationsCount must be loaded in order to have a valid value in this field.

field.name: InternalApplication
field.description: Indicate if the candidate is an internal employee or not. A candidate that apply on a internal career site is set to internal automatically. Thus, if a candidate is hired and the cie setting AutomaticallyIdentifyCandidateAsInternal is set to 1, a task (IdentifyCandidateAsInternalTask) will be created to set the field to true when the start date is reached.

field.name: IsApplicant
field.description: This field indicate if the candidate manifested his desired to be employed by the cie. He has applied on at least one requisition or he has submitted his profile. If the candidate is only a referrer, this field will be false.

field.name: IsPersonalInfoMasked
field.description: This field is for internal uses. It indicate if the personal informations have been masked by the Squeezer policy the perform a soft delete. Not importable.

field.name: LastActivityDate
field.description: This field is read-only. It contains the most recent date between the last modified date and the csw latest date.

field.name: LastApplicationDate
field.description: This field contains the date of the last application of the candidate. This column has been added to correct a performance issue in the squeezer engine.

field.name: LastModifiedDate
field.description: The date on which the candidate as been modified for the last time.

field.name: NotifyByEmail
field.description: Indicate if the candidte which to be notify by email when a new requisition that match his profile is posted on the career site.

field.name: Number
field.description: The unique identifier of this entity.

field.name: PersonalInfoValidated
field.description: Indicate if the personnal informations has been validated or not by the candidate.

field.name: Salary
field.description: The salary the candidate whiches to have.

field.name: SocialSecurityNumber
field.description: The social security number of the candidate.

field.name: WebSite
field.description: The url of the web site of the candidate.

field.name: ZipCode
field.description: The zip code of the personnal address of the candidate. This field, when updated, will trigerred automatically the update of the geo conding informations.

relation.name: AddressBookHistory
relation.description: This relation shows the candidate address book history.

relation.name: BackgroundCheckGeneral
relation.description: This relation is the candidate information about background check general.

relation.name: Credentials
relation.description: The credentials informations that permit to the candidate to logon to the system for entering his general application or applied on requisition.

relation.name: Currency
relation.description: This is the currency that the candidate has entered to indicate in which currency the amount of dollars are.

relation.name: DriverLicense
relation.description: This relation is the candidate driver license.

relation.name: ExchangeUser
relation.description: Represent the information used between enterprise and TalentExchange when sending candidates to Exchange

relation.name: History
relation.description: All the application tracking history items related to the candidate. With the application tracking history items we can know everything about was has happened to the candidate during his hiring process.

relation.name: JobShifts
relation.description: Indicate for which job shifts the candidate is applying to. It can be day, evening, night, on call, etc.

relation.name: MilitaryServices
relation.description: This relation holds the candidate military service.

relation.name: PreferredPhone
relation.description: This relation define the preferred phone the candidate want to be use as primary to contact him.

relation.name: ResidenceLocation
relation.description: The location where the residence of the candidate is located. This field, when updated, will trigerred automatically the update of the geo conding informations.

relation.name: ShiftAvailability
relation.description: Define the relation between candidate and his shiftavailability. NOTE: The primary key of the table ShiftAvailability is the candidateNo.

relation.name: TimeZone
relation.description: The timezone in which the candidate is applying.

relation.name: WorkConditions
relation.description: This contains the Work Conditions enter by a candidate related to the hourly world.

entity.name: Certification
entity.description: A certification is one element that defines the talent profile of a candidate or employee. The notion of certification refers to an official recognition of skills and knowledge in a specific area. A certification is emitted by an authorized provider. All certifications are defined in the standard Taleo library - it is not possible for customers to add new elements. However, customers can activate/deactivate elements.

field.name: Active
field.description: To be documented.

field.name: CreationDate
field.description: The creation date of the entity

field.name: Description
field.description: This attribute describes the certification.

field.name: LastModificationDate
field.description: The date of the last modification of the entity

field.name: Number
field.description: This attribute is the certification identifier. Use the Number to search and identify the certification to update.

relation.name: Status
relation.description: The Administration Entity status of the administration entity

entity.name: CertificationRequirement
entity.description: A required or asset certification.

relation.name: Certification
relation.description: The certification used in this requirement.

relation.name: JobProfile
relation.description: The job profile of this requirement.

field.name: LastModificationDate

relation.name: Status

field.name: Description

field.name: LastModificationDate

entity.name: CieProgram
entity.description: This entity represents an educational program. It's a field of study. For example: Information Technology, Journalism, Political Science, etc...

field.name: CreationDate

field.name: Description
field.description: This field is the name of the program in multiplie languages.

field.name: LastModificationDate
field.description: The last modification date of the Study

relation.name: Status
relation.description: The status of the Program

entity.name: CompensationHistory
entity.description: The Employee's current compensation data. Each employee can have only one record that contains his latest compensation data. Without this record, no other history data can be added (bonus, salary or stock). If your zone is already configured to use the "Compensation" application, you can only view this entity in read-only mode. No editing actions are allowed. Please note that data will be automatically extracted from "Compensation".

field.name: CompensationSystemId
field.description: To be documented.

field.name: CurrentSalary

relation.name: Employee
relation.description: The employee

relation.name: SalaryHistories

entity.name: Competency
entity.description: A competency is knowledge, a skill or an ability. Competencies are contained in the Taleo Competencies List.

field.name: Alias
field.description: Customer specific multilingual competency name.

field.name: Description
field.description: Multilingual description of the competency. This field supports rich-text markup. Descriptions may also be contextualized to specific OLF values using competency definitions.

field.name: DescriptionText
field.description: Multilingual plain text version of the description.

field.name: InternalCode
field.description: Taleo unique identifier used as entity key.

field.name: LastModifiedDate
field.description: Holds the last modification date of the entity.

relation.name: CompetencyCategories
relation.description: The competency categories associated to the competency.

relation.name: CompetencyDefinitions
relation.description: The competency definitions associated to the competency.

relation.name: CompetencyGroup
relation.description: The competency group associated to the competency.

relation.name: CompetencyProvider
relation.description: Competency provider associated to the competency.

relation.name: CompetencyType
relation.description: Customer specific competency type associated to competency.

relation.name: DefaultCompetencyType
relation.description: Default competency type associated to competency.

relation.name: NetworkJobFields
relation.description: Network job fields associated to Competency.

relation.name: PrimaryNetworkJobField
relation.description: Primary network job field associated to Competency.

relation.name: RatingModel
relation.description: Rating model associated to Competency.

relation.name: SubCompetencies
relation.description: Sub-competencies associated to the competency.

entity.name: CompetencyCategory
entity.description: A competency category is a way for classifying competencies. Competencies are mainly used for filtering purposes. A competency can be associated to many categories.

field.name: Description
field.description: The multilingual description of the competency category.

field.name: LastModifiedDate
field.description: Holds the last modification date of the entity.

relation.name: Competencies
relation.description: The competencies associated to the competency category.

entity.name: CompetencyDefinition
entity.description: A Competency Definition provides a specific description for an associated context. It overrides the default competency description when the competency is used within a specific context.

relation.name: Competency
relation.description: The competency associated to the competency definition.

entity.name: CompetencyGroup
entity.description: A competency group is a way for classifying competencies. Groups are mainly used for filtering and display grouping purposes. A competency can be associated to one group.

field.name: Description
field.description: The multilingual description of the competency group.

field.name: DisplaySequence
field.description: The display sequence of the competency group.

field.name: LastModifiedDate
field.description: Holds the last modification date of the entity.

entity.name: CompetencyProvider
entity.description: A competency provider owns a library of competencies and other related content that can be used by the client.

field.name: Description
field.description: The description of the competency provider

relation.name: Parent
relation.description: The parent competency provider.

entity.name: CompetencyRequirement
entity.description: A required or asset competency.

relation.name: Competency
relation.description: The competency used in this requirement.

relation.name: JobProfile
relation.description: The job profile of this requirement.

relation.name: PerformanceRating
relation.description: To be documented.

entity.name: CompetencyType
entity.description: Competency types provide a way to group and organize competencies. There are three types of competencies: job specific, language, and behavioral competencies.

field.name: Code
field.description: Unique identifier of the competency type.

entity.name: ConfigProfile
entity.description: Represents the base configuration for a specifique user profile; settings shared between users

entity.name: ConfigurableMetric
entity.description: This class is a lookup class that define all the possible values for the employee configurable metrics available in the system. The type specifided the kind of metric we are dealing with. The description can be edited by the user, the user can add or remove an image associated to a possible choice of values. The possible values can be actived or de-activated.

entity.name: CoverageArea
entity.description: Coverage area is the base entity used to grant access based on dimensions (O, L, F)

field.name: Code
field.description: The code of the coverage area

entity.name: Credentials
entity.description: Credential is the representation of all authentication information and identification information used to authenticate a career section user.

field.name: ForcePasswordChange
field.description: This flags tells if the credential will be forced to change is password once he will be authenticated properly.

field.name: Guid
field.description: Global unique identifier for this credential. This is then used to find this user across Taleo's products

field.name: Password
field.description: Credential's password. The password is hashed so that nobody can read it.

field.name: SSOID
field.description: To be documented.

field.name: Username
field.description: Credential's user name.

field.name: UsernameMigrated
field.description: This flags checks if the migration mechanism is showed to the credential. This flag will be enabled if his username is his email address. Once the user has changed is user name from his email address to a valid user name, this flag is set to false. Then, this user will not be able to access the migration mechanism again.

relation.name: Candidate
relation.description: Candidate entity related to this credential.

entity.name: Currency
entity.description: This entity is a lookup representing a form of money that is in public circulation.

field.name: BaseCurrencyRatio
field.description: This field is the value of the currency in US dollars. This field is monthly updated.

field.name: ISO4217Abbreviation
field.description: This field represents the ISO4217 alphabetic code of the currency. In most cases, it is composed of the country's two-character Internet country code plus an extra character to denote the currency unit. For example, the code for Canadian Dollars is simply Canada's two-character Internet code ("CA") plus a one-character currency designator ("D").

field.name: ISO4217Code
field.description: This field represents the ISO4217 numeric code of the currency.

field.name: Symbol
field.description: This field is the symbol of the currency. For instance th symbol of the US dollar is '$'.

entity.name: CustomSelection
entity.description: Represents a user-defined selection in akirax

field.name: SortUsingName
field.description: Indicates if this selection should be ordered alphabetically or not.

relation.name: Elements
relation.description: Associated CustomSelectionElement for this CustomSelection.

entity.name: CustomSelectionElement
entity.description: This entity represents an element of a custom-made selection. The description of this element is stored in TextTool resources.

field.name: Sequence
field.description: The position at which this element should be ordered in the selection.

relation.name: Selection
relation.description: Associated CustomSelection for this CustomSelectionElement.

entity.name: CustomSelectionUsage
entity.description: This entity links a selection to a metafield that uses it. The metafield is usually a custom field created by the client.

field.name: Number
field.description: The physical key identifying this entity.

relation.name: Selection
relation.description: Associated CustomSelection for this CustomSelectionUsage.

entity.name: DatabaseLookup
entity.description: Base entity type for all database lookup entities in this model.

field.name: Description
field.description: Textual representation of the entity.

field.name: Number
field.description: The physical key of the entity.

entity.name: DeletedEntityLog
entity.description: This entity is used as a log container for entities that are tracked for their deletion. Such entities will generate entries in this entity when they are deleted. See DeletedEntityType for the tracked entity types.

field.name: Date
field.description: The delation date of the entity

field.name: DeletedEntityNumber
field.description: The no of the deleted entity

relation.name: Type
relation.description: The types of entities that generated log entry.

entity.name: DeletedEntityType
entity.description: Types of entities that generates log entries on deletion. removeCheckOnUpdateFields=true)

field.name: Code
field.description: The code of the DeletedEntityType

entity.name: Employee
entity.description: An employee is the top-level object representing an employee. At this level, the information is distinct from the other possible types of talent users (candidate and contact). Only employee specific information is contained in this object (as described in the field/relations below). Most of the overall person information is contained in the related TalentUser and User objects.

field.name: ConfirmProfile
field.description: True if a profile confirmation is required at next employee login.

field.name: CreationDate
field.description: Holds the creation date of the entity.

field.name: LastModifiedDate
field.description: Holds the last modification date of the entity.

field.name: ProfileMatched
field.description: True if the employee has been matched to an existing candidate profile. False if a brand new candidate has been created and associated to this employee.

relation.description: The location of the employee.

relation.name: Manager
relation.description: The manager of the employee.

relation.name: Organization
relation.description: The organization of the employee.

relation.name: TalentUser
relation.description: The link towards the generic talent user entity that contains profile type information. This link will also bring you towards the user entity that contains personal type information.

entity.name: EmployeeMetrics
entity.description: The employee metrics contains valuable and sensitive information regarding an employee.

field.name: CompetencyScore
field.description: The last official review competency score of the employee, normalized value between 0 and 1. This attribute may be null if no score was provided in the system.

field.name: CompetencyScoreDate
field.description: The date the last official review competency score of the employee has been set.

field.name: GoalScore
field.description: The last official review goal score of the employee, normalized value between 0 and 1. This attribute may be null if no score was provided in the system.

field.name: GoalScoreDate
field.description: The date the last official review goal score of the employee has been set.

field.name: LastReviewScore
field.description: The last official review score of the employee, normalized value between 0 and 1. This attribute may be null if no score was provided in the system.

field.name: LastReviewScoreDate
field.description: The date the last official review score of the employee has been set.

field.name: PromotabilityReadinessEnd
field.description: To be documented.

field.name: PromotabilityReadinessSetDate
field.description: The promotability readiness metric determines in what time frame the employee will be ready for a promotion. The set date indicates the moment that the information was captured. For example, a promotability readiness set date, start and end equal to 01/12/07, 6, 12 means that on Dec 1st, 2007, it was evaluated that the employee is ready for a promotion in 6 months to 1 year. It is important to note that the readiness estimate does not change automatically when time elapses. On May 1st, the employee will still show a 6-12 months readiness time frame (just that this information was captured on Dec 1st).

field.name: PromotabilityReadinessStart
field.description: To be documented.

relation.name: Employee
relation.description: Employee associated to the employee metrics.

relation.name: EmployeePotential
relation.description: The potential of the employee to be promoted to another job or position.

relation.name: EmployeeRiskOfLoss
relation.description: The risk of losing this employee to an internal transfer or an external company.

entity.name: EmployeePicture
entity.description: The employee picture contains an image of the likeness of the employee. Currently only the JPG format is supported and the size must be small.

field.name: CheckSum
field.description: the checksum of the picture

field.name: Picture
field.description: The picture contains an image of the likeness of the employee. It is resized (48x48) and compress in the jpeg format

field.name: PictureMedium
field.description: The picture contains an image of the likeness of the employee. It is resized (256x256) and compress in the jpeg format. This field is updated when the picture field value is changed.

entity.name: EmployeePotential
entity.description: The potential of the employee to be promoted to another job or position.

entity.name: EmployeeRiskOfLoss
entity.description: The risk of losing this employee to an internal transfer or an external company.

entity.name: EmployeeStatus
entity.description: The current employment status of the employee.

field.name: Code
field.description: The unique code of this enumeration value.

entity.name: EmploymentStatus
entity.description: Employee Status lookup values. It determines the desired person's employement status.

entity.name: Entity
entity.description: Base entity type for all entities in this model.

entity.description: Status used between Talent Exchange and Enterprise when sending candidate to Exchange.

field.name: Code
field.description: The code (unique id) of the ExchangeStatus

field.name: IsUsable
field.description: Flag to distinguish which status can be set to the ExchangeUser and which cannot.

entity.name: ExchangeUser
entity.description: removeCheckOnCreate=true, removeCheckOnUpdate=true)

field.name: ExchangeStatusDate
field.description: The exchange status date of the exchange user

field.name: IsExchangeRejected
field.description: Indicate if the candidate is rejected or not in a point of view of Talent Exchange.

field.name: Number
field.description: The unique identifier of this entity.

field.name: PurchasedOwnerGuid
field.description: The user that has submit a candidate into Talent exchange and that was successfuly bought.

relation.name: Candidate
relation.description: The CSUSer linked to the EchangeUser

relation.name: ExchangeStatus
relation.description: The exchange status of the exchange user

entity.name: Experience
entity.description: This entity represents an experience that a person has working, or working in a specific field or occupation. (removeCheckOnCreate=true,removeCheckOnRead=true, removeCheckOnUpdate=true, removeCheckOnDelete=true)

field.name: BeginDate
field.description: This field is the date when the candidate began working for this job.

field.name: CurrentEmployer
field.description: This field indicates if it is or not the employer for whom the candidate is currently working.

field.name: DisplaySequence
field.description: This field determines the order to display this experience among the candidate's experiences. It's also a part of the key (Candidate, Requisition, PorfileLangange, displaySequence) identifying a specific candidate's experience for a specific application and for a specific profile language.

field.name: EndDate
field.description: This field is the date when the candidate stopped working for this job.

field.name: LastModifiedDate
field.description: The last modification date ot the Experience

field.name: NameWhileEmployed
field.description: This field defines the name the candidate was using when working for this company.

field.name: Number
field.description: The unique internal id of the entity

field.name: OtherEmployerName
field.description: This field is used when the candidate's employer is not listed in the employers list. It contains the candidate's employer name.

field.name: OtherJobTitle
field.description: This field is used when the candidate's job function is not listed in the job functions list. It contains the candidate's job function name.

field.name: PermissionToContact
field.description: This field hold the value to identity if the recruiter have the permission to contact the old supervisor.

field.name: ReasonForLeaving
field.description: Contains the reason why the person left this employer.

field.name: Responsibility
field.description: This field is the description of the responsibilities the candidate had or has for this job.

field.name: Supervisor
field.description: This field is the name of the candidate's supervisor.

field.name: SupervisorEmail
field.description: This field hold the value of the supervisor address email.

field.name: SupervisorPhone
field.description: This field is the phone number of the candidate's supervisor.

field.name: SupervisorTitle
field.description: This field hold the value of the supervisor title during the employment.

relation.name: Employer
relation.description: This field represents the employer related to the candidate's experience.

relation.name: JobFunction
relation.description: This field represents the job function related to the candidate's experience.

relation.name: Location
relation.description: Indicate where this employer is located.

relation.name: ProfileInformation
relation.description: Link the experience to the profile information.

field.name: Name

field.description: Group's description

entity.description: The Hierarchical role represent a role hierarchy within a business. This role is assigned to users. There can be one and only one parent of the role in the hierarchy..

entity.name: JobRole
entity.description: A job role is a generic definition of job that applies to all employees - as opposed to a position, which is a specific instance of a job. Actually, a position can be defined as a job role joined to an organization and a location. A job role has a code, name and definition for documentation purposes and also supports the concept of a job profile that specifies the requirements to execute the job.

field.name: CustomerID
field.description: The JobRole internal identifier specified by the customer. Used for referencing a job role identifier known in another external system for integration purposes.

field.name: LastModifiedDate
field.description: Holds the last modification date of the entity.

relation.name: DefaultDefinition
relation.description: A job role has a code, name and definition for documentation purposes.

relation.name: JobCodes
relation.description: Job codes are meant as a convenience way to map several customer job codes to one defined in Taleo. This concept is optional and mainly for use for system to system integration. Job codes are only available for management through the Connect interface.

relation.name: JobField
relation.description: The job field of the job role.

relation.name: JobLevel
relation.description: The job level of the job role.

relation.name: JobProfile
relation.description: The job profile that specifies the requirements to execute a job.

entity.description: A job role has a code, name and definition for documentation purposes

field.description: The description of the job.

field.name: DescriptionText
field.description: Plain text version of the job role definition description field that supports rich-text markup. This field is automatically converted and filled when populating the job role definition description.

field.name: Qualifications
field.description: The qualifications of the job.

field.name: QualificationsText
field.description: Plain text version of the job role definition qualifications field that supports rich-text markup. This field is automatically converted and filled when populating the job role definition qualifications.

field.name: Responsabilities
field.description: The responsibilities of the job.

field.name: ResponsabilitiesText
field.description: Plain text version of the job role definition responsibilities field that supports rich-text markup. This field is automatically converted and filled when populating the job role definition responsibilities.

entity.name: Location
entity.description: Class that represents a company"s specific location. A company location represents a geographical region. Only locations that are useful to the company are present in this structure. Location is used in the application to define a country; it could also define a State (or province), a region and a city. It usually describes locations where activities happen within the company. As far as country, state and region are concerned, they should be a subset of the reference location structure.

field.name: CustomerID
field.description: The Location internal identifier specified by the customer. Used for referencing a location identifier known in another external system for integration purposes.

field.name: IsWorkerLocation
field.description: Flag variable used in SmartOrg UI. This checkbox is used to check if the field is FusionWorkLocation or not.

field.name: WorkerLocationAddress
field.description: String value used in SmartOrg UI. This field is used to provide the address of Fusionworklocation.

relation.name: NetworkLocation
relation.description: Associated Network Location for this Company Location

relation.name: Parent
relation.description: Reference to the parent of a specific composite

entity.name: LocationLevel
entity.description: Company location specific level

entity.name: LocationSequence
entity.description: Company Location specific sequence

entity.name: Lookup
entity.description: Base entity type for all lookup entities in this model.

entity.name: MatrixManager
entity.description: MatrixManager determines the relationship between an employee and an external manager. Usually, matrix managers are people requested by the employee's direct manager to have access to one or more of his employees. It usually takes place during a delegation or temporary replacement of managment responsibilities. A matrix manager is also known as a proxy.

field.name: DelegateTasks
field.description: Indicates if the tasks about one of the managed employees are to be delegated to the matrix manager.

field.name: FromDate
field.description: The date the matrix manager starts to have access to specified employees.

field.name: LastModifiedDate
field.description: Holds the last modification date of the entity.

field.name: ToDate
field.description: The date the matrix manager stops having access to specified employees.

relation.name: DelegatedEmployees
relation.description: The employees associated to the matrix manager. The matrix manager has access and responsibilites on these employees.

relation.name: ManagerRequester
relation.description: The employee requester for a matrix manager. It represents the manager who delegated its reponsibilities on a matrix manager.

relation.name: MatrixManager
relation.description: The employee associated to the matrix manager. It represents the matrix manager itself.

entity.name: MetricType
entity.description: This class is a lookup class that define all the possible employee metric types available in the system. For now the types are sourced by Taleo only.

entity.name: MilitaryService
entity.description: This class represents the details about the military service that the candidate has done or is currently active.

field.name: Branch
field.description: This field holds the branch of military service(navy, air force, etc)

field.name: Country
field.description: This field holds the country where the candidate execute his military service.

field.name: DischargeStatus
field.description: This field holds the dischrge status of the military service.

field.name: DisplaySequence
field.description: This field determines the order to display this military service among the candidate's military services.

field.name: EndDate
field.description: This field holds the end date of the military service..

field.name: RankAchieved
field.description: This field holds the rank achieved in the military service.

field.name: ServiceNumber
field.description: This field holds the service number the candidate is assign to.

field.name: ServiceStatus
field.description: This field holds the service status of the military service.

field.name: StartDate
field.description: This field holds the start date of the military service.

entity.name: NetworkJobField
entity.description: Class that represents network Job Field. This is the list of employment domains, with a hierarchical view.

relation.name: Parent
relation.description: Reference to the parent of a specific composite

entity.name: NetworkJobFieldLevel
entity.description: Network JobField specific level

entity.name: NetworkJobFieldSequence
entity.description: Network JobField specific sequence

entity.name: NetworkLocation
entity.description: Class that represents a network-specific location. Taleo locations are a list of locations from around the world. They are usually used to generate the locations of a company, and they are also used in the Career Section to help a candidate select the actual location. They also represent the location used to do a posting, since posting is often done based on a "region" (which is less detailed than the city used in Location). The reference location structure has 3 levels: country, province/state and region.

field.name: ISO3166Alpha3
field.description: ISO3166Alpha3 code of the location

field.name: Latitude
field.description: Latitude of the location

field.name: Longitude
field.description: Longitue of the location

relation.name: Parent

entity.name: NetworkLocationLevel

entity.name: NetworkLocationSequence

entity.name: NominationPool
entity.description: A nomination pool is a list of people (nominees) that have been suggested as potential incumbents for a specific position. Access to the nomination pool is usually limited to the owner who is also the position's manager. However, there is no restriction to who can nominate a person.

entity.name: OLFCoverageArea
entity.description: Regroupment of Organization(s), Location(s) and JobField(s)

entity.name: Organization
entity.description: Class that represents a company-specific Organization. It describes the divisional structure of the company. This includes, but is not restricted to, company, location, division, area, department and workgroup.

field.name: CustomerID
field.description: The Organization internal identifier specified by the customer. Used for referencing an organization identifier known in another external system for integration purpose

relation.name: Industry
relation.description: Associated Industry for this Organization

relation.name: Parent
relation.description: Reference to the parent of a specific composite

entity.name: OrganizationLevel
entity.description: Organization specific level

entity.name: OrganizationSequence
entity.description: Organization specific sequence

entity.name: Origin
entity.description: Object origin entity Determines the origin of an entity.

field.name: Code
field.description: Code of the Object origin entity

entity.name: PerformanceRatingValue
entity.description: FOR TALEO INTERNAL USE ONLY This Entity is reserved for internal communication with the Compensation Application and will not be accessible via TCC or TCB at runtime. Do not use.

entity.name: PhoneType
entity.description: This class is a lookup that display the phone type. i.e Home Phone, Work Phone, etc.

entity.name: Position
entity.description: A position is an occurrence of a Job Role. It can also be represented by the chair. Positions are hierarchical. It defines the business employee structure. Typically, the topmost positions are managed by HR team in the system. Other positions can be managed by managers.

field.name: Criticality
field.description: The criticality on a scale of 1 to 5. However, in the current products, only a criticality level of 5 is considered "critical".

field.name: CustomerID
field.description: The JobPosition internal identifier specified by the customer. Used for referencing a job position identifier known in another external system for integration purposes.

field.name: Description
field.description: The description of the position.

field.name: IsOpen
field.description: Flag indicating if the position is open (without an incumbent employee)

field.name: LastModifiedDate
field.description: Holds the last modification date of the entity.

field.name: NbEmployees
field.description: The number of employees for the position

field.name: Number
field.description: The unique internal identifier of this entity.

field.name: TargetStartDate
field.description: The target start date of the position - typically use to manage new positions.

relation.name: Department
relation.description: The department associated to the position.

relation.name: Employee
relation.description: The currently assigned employee filling the position.

relation.name: JobProfile
relation.description: The position job profile. It describes the specific requirements to occupy the position.

relation.name: JobRole
relation.description: The job role associated to the position.

relation.name: Location
relation.description: The location associated to the position.

relation.name: Manager
relation.description: The manager owner of the position.

relation.name: Organization
relation.description: The organization associated to the position.

relation.name: ParentPosition
relation.description: The parent position in the position hierarchy.

entity.name: Profile
entity.description: The profile is the set of information describing the person at a professional and educational level. The profile is not related to any specific job posting.

relation.name: ProfileInformation
relation.description: The ProfileInformation

entity.name: ProfileImportance
entity.description: The relative importance of a profile element.

field.name: Code
field.description: The unique code of the profile importance.

entity.name: ProfileInformation
entity.description: Application is the centerpiece of the selection process. All actions and events are based and take place on the application. An application is created as soon as a candidate is matched to a requisition, whatever the way (mail application, use of career section, automatic match, reference).

field.name: CandidateNumber
field.description: To be documented.

field.name: CreationDate
field.description: The date on which the application has been created.

field.name: IsInternal
field.description: Indicate if the application has been made by an internal employee. True if the employee was an internal one at the moment he applies on the requisition, false otherwise.

field.name: LastModifiedDate
field.description: Holds the last modification date of the entity.

field.name: Locale
field.description: Indicates the language in which the person's profile has been filled.

field.name: Number
field.description: The unique internal id of the entity

relation.name: ApplicationCertifications
relation.description: This relation define the certifications related to the application.

relation.name: ApplicationText
relation.description: All the text datas that a candidate can add to his application. For now the candidate can submit his pasted resume, career objectives, cover letter and additional information.

relation.name: Candidate
relation.description: Link to the candidate associated to the person's profile.

relation.name: Experiences
relation.description: This is the talent user profile list of experiences.

relation.name: HistoryItems
relation.description: The list of history items related to the profile information.

relation.name: References
relation.description: This relation define the references the candidate will attach to his application or profile.

relation.name: Studies
relation.description: The list of the candidate studies, educations, related to the application.

entity.name: RaterType
entity.description: Rater type lookup values. The rater type determines who has provided the competency answer.

field.name: Code
field.description: The unique code of the rater type.

entity.name: RatingDimension
entity.description: A rating dimension offers a scale of values to select from to evaluate a competency or goal. The rating dimension type determines the usage pattern of this part of the evaluation.

field.name: Description
field.description: The description of the rating dimension.

field.name: LastModifiedDate
field.description: Holds the last modification date of the entity.

field.name: Number
field.description: The internal unique identifier.

relation.name: CompetencyProvider
relation.description: The provider of the Rating Dimension

relation.name: RatingDimensionType
relation.description: The rating dimension type associated to rating dimension.

relation.name: RatingValues
relation.description: Rating values associated to rating dimension.

entity.name: RatingDimensionType
entity.description: The rating dimension type determines the usage pattern of this part of the evaluation. The types LEVEL, INTEREST, EXPERIENCE and LAST_USED represent the dimensions also used in the recruiting product and candidate profiles. The SCORE dimension is the one mainly used in the Performance Management product for performance reviews.

field.name: Code
field.description: The unique identifier of the rating dimension type.

entity.name: RatingModel
entity.description: A rating model is a set of rating dimensions each representing an aspect of the evaluation. A rating model is used to evaluate a business item, typically a competency but other uses are supported.

field.name: Description
field.description: The description of the rating model.

field.name: LastModifiedDate
field.description: Holds the last modification date of the entity.

relation.name: CompetencyProvider
relation.description: The provider of the Rating Model

relation.name: RatingModelDimensions
relation.description: The rating dimensions associated to the rating model.

entity.name: RatingModelDimension
entity.description: A rating model is defined by a set of rating dimensions each representing an aspect of the evaluation. The rating model dimension lists the rating dimensions associated to a rating model.

field.name: DisplaySequence
field.description: Rating dimension display sequence.

field.name: Number
field.description: The internal unique identifier.

relation.name: RatingDimension
relation.description: The rating dimension associated to the rating model.

relation.name: RatingModel
relation.description: The rating model associated to the rating dimension.

entity.name: RatingValue
entity.description: The rating value is a qualitative and quantitative (numerical) way of describing an evaluation state on a rating dimension scale.

field.name: DisplaySequence
field.description: Defines the order in which to display the rating values (may or may not correspond to the numerical value sequence)

field.name: Name
field.description: The name or display label of the rating value.

field.name: Number
field.description: The internal unique identifier.

field.name: NumericValue
field.description: The numerical value corresponding to this rating value - mandatory as it is used in the aggregation and normalization calculations.

relation.name: RatingDimension
relation.description: A rating dimension offers a set of rating values to select from for the evaluation.

entity.name: Reassignment
entity.description: Reassignment lookup values. It determines the level of readiness for a person in beeing assigned for a different job.

entity.name: RecruitmentSourceVisibility
entity.description: This class define the visibility associated with recruitment source.

field.name: Code
field.description: The unique code.

entity.name: Reference
entity.description: Minimal information enabling to identify or reach a person. A reference can be a person a supervisor or boss in the case of work experience.

field.name: Company

field.name: DisplaySequence
field.description: This field determines the order to display this reference among the candidate's references.

field.name: EmailAddress
field.description: This field hold the value for the email of the reference.

field.name: Fax
field.description: This field hold the value for the fax number of the reference.

field.name: FirstName

field.name: LastName

field.name: MiddleInitial
field.description: This field hold the middle Initial of the reference.

field.name: Number
field.description: This entity key

field.name: PhoneNumber
field.description: This field hold the value for the phone number of the reference.

field.name: Relationship
field.description: This field hold the value for the relationship of the reference. I.e Boss, mother, etc.

field.name: Title
field.description: This field hold the value for the job function title of reference

relation.name: Country
relation.description: This relation defines the country of the reference.

relation.name: ProfileInformation
relation.description: The application on which the reference is associated.

relation.name: ReferenceType
relation.description: This relation define the type of relation the reference is associated.

entity.name: ReferenceType
entity.description: This class define the type of reference the candidate can have. i.e Personal, Occupational, etc

entity.name: RequiredLanguages
entity.description: Indicates which languages are required to be filled for a user defined selection. This value can be one of: both content and webtop languages, or webtop languages only.

field.name: Code

entity.name: RequirementValue

relation.name: RatedDimension

relation.name: TargetRatingValue

entity.name: StructureLevel
entity.description: Generic entity to provide specification of the different levels of any tree structure

field.name: Code
field.description: Unique identifier allowing providing a meaningful key

field.name: Level
field.description: Refers to the level of depth in the tree structure. First visible level will be 1 and root is considered as being at level 0 (not visible)

field.name: Name
field.description: Name of the level (multilingual)

field.name: Visible
field.description: Indicates whether the level is visible or not

relation.name: Status
relation.description: Reference to the Administration Entity Status of the structure level.

entity.name: Study
entity.description: This entity represents a part of candidate's resume. It describes one of his/her educational degree and history. (removeCheckOnCreate=true,removeCheckOnRead=true, removeCheckOnUpdate=true, removeCheckOnDelete=true)

field.name: DisplaySequence
field.description: This field determines the order to display this study among the candidate's studies. It's also a part of the key (Candidate, Requisition, PorfileLangange, displaySequence) identifying a specific candidate's study for a specific application and for a specific profile language.

field.name: Gpa
field.description: This field (Grade Point Average) is a number that represents the average of a student's grades during his or her time at an institution. Usually it is weighted by number of credits given for the course.

field.name: GpaRange
field.description: This field is the maximum grade value at the institution.

field.name: Graduated
field.description: This field holds the value if the candidate graduate from high school or receive a GED (General Education Development)

field.name: GraduationDate
field.description: This field is the date when the candidate has received his academic degree.

field.name: GraduationDateProjected
field.description: This field holds the value to identify if the graduated date is a projected date.

field.name: LastModifiedDate
field.description: The last modification date of the entity

field.name: NameWhileAttending
field.description: This fields hold the value for the name use by the candidate when attending at the time of education.

field.name: Number
field.description: The unique internal identifier of this entity.

field.name: OtherCourseTitle
field.description: This field is used when the candidate's program is not listed in the programs list. It contains the candidate's program name.

field.name: OtherInstitutionCity
field.description: This field holds the value for the other location city if the institution list doesn't contains the value the candidate need.

field.name: OtherInstitutionName
field.description: This field is used when the candidate's institution is not listed in the institutions list. It contains the candidate's institution name.

field.name: StartDate
field.description: This field contains the date of the beginning of the candidate's program.

relation.name: Institution
relation.description: This field represents the institution where the candidate studied.

relation.name: OtherInstitutionLocation
relation.description: This relation define the location for the other institution if not available in the selector.

relation.name: ProfileInformation
relation.description: This field represents the application related to the candidate's study.

relation.name: Program
relation.description: This field represents the program related to the candidate's study.

relation.name: StudyLevel
relation.description: This field represents the education level related to the study. For example: High school diploma.

entity.name: StudyLevel
entity.description: Study Level lookup values. It determines the education levels a person has or intends to reach.

entity.name: SubCompetency
entity.description: A sub-competency is a constituent element of a competency. It describes a competency with more granularity.

field.name: DisplaySequence
field.description: Sub-competency display sequence.

field.name: Name
field.description: Customer specific sub-competency multilingual name.

relation.name: CompetencyProvider
relation.description: The provider of the SubCompetency

relation.name: ParentCompetency
relation.description: The competency associated to the sub-competency.

entity.name: TalentCompetency
entity.description: The talent competency determines the set of answers provided for a competency. A competency can be rated on many dimensions.

field.name: AssessedSSA

relation.name: AssessmentRating
relation.description: To be documented.

relation.name: Competency
relation.description: The competency associated to the talent competency.

relation.name: EmployeePerformanceRating
relation.description: To be documented.

relation.name: ExperienceRating
relation.description: To be documented.

relation.name: InterestRating
relation.description: To be documented.

relation.name: LastUsedRating
relation.description: To be documented.

relation.name: ManagerPerformanceRating
relation.description: To be documented.

relation.name: ProficiencyRating
relation.description: To be documented.

relation.name: TalentUser
relation.description: Link to the the talent user.

entity.name: TalentCompetencyValue
entity.description: The talent competency value represents one answer provided for a competency.

relation.name: RatedDimension
relation.description: The rating dimension associated to the talent competency value. It indicates which dimension of the competency is rated.

relation.name: RatedValue
relation.description: The rating value associated to the talent competency value. It indicates the rating value provided for the rated dimension.

relation.name: RaterType
relation.description: The rater type associated to the talent competency value.

relation.name: TalentCompetency
relation.description: The talent competency associated to the talent competency value.

entity.name: TalentUser
entity.description: The talent user is the common person information layer. A person can be a candidate, an employee, a contact, or any combination of these types. The talent user also contains a part of the person's profile and job preferences. Remaining part of the profile is found via the profile relationship. removeCheckOnCreate=true)

field.name: CustomerID
field.description: TalentUser internal identifier specified by the customer. Used for referencing the talentUser identifier known in another external system for integration purposes.

field.name: LastModifiedDate
field.description: Holds the last modification date of the entity.

field.name: Number
field.description: The unique internal identifier of this entity.

field.name: YearsInIndustry
field.description: Number of years in the current industry field.

field.name: YearsOfManagementExperience
field.description: Number of years of management experience.

relation.name: ArUser
relation.description: Link to the user associated to the TalentUser). The user entity provides common information and access to the products via the user accounts.

relation.name: Employee
relation.description: The user as an employee.

relation.name: EmploymentStatus
relation.description: The desired employee statuses associated to the person.

relation.name: InterestInInternationalAssignment
relation.description: The level of interest associated to the person in being relocated internationally.

relation.name: JobFields
relation.description: The desired or preferred job fields associated to the person.

relation.name: JobLevels
relation.description: The desired job levels associated to the person.

relation.name: JobSchedules
relation.description: The desired job schedules associated to the person.

relation.name: JobTypes
relation.description: The desired job types associated to the person.

relation.name: Locations
relation.description: The desired or preferred locations associated to the person.

relation.name: Organizations
relation.description: The desired or preferred organizations associated to the person.

relation.name: Preferences
relation.description: The talent user preferences associated to the person.

relation.name: Profile
relation.description: To be documented.

relation.name: Reassignment
relation.description: The level of readiness associated to the person in beeing reassigned.

relation.name: StudyLevels
relation.description: The desired study levels associated to the person.

relation.name: TalentCompetencies
relation.description: Link to the the talent user rated competencies. It contains all the competency answers provided by the person itself or by another person.

relation.name: WillingnessToTravel
relation.description: The desired travel options associated to the person.

relation.name: WillRelocate
relation.description: The level of interest associated to the person in being relocated.

entity.name: TalentUserPreferences
entity.description: Represents the preferences that the candidate can configure from the Career Site. The candidate selects the values that fit him best and save them in the database via this entity. These preferences are later checked by the process that must take them into account. For example, the "sendApplicationAknowledgement" attribute must be checked to determine if the related corresponding must be sent to a candidate.

field.name: CareerSiteLanguage
field.description: Contains the language in which the Career Site must be displayed to the candidate or agent.

field.name: CorrespondenceLanguage
field.description: Contains the language in which the correspondence must be sent to the candidate or agent. When no value is selected, the language of the last general application is used instead.

field.name: DoNotEmail
field.description: Indicate the the TalentUser does not want to receive any email.

field.name: LastReferralListAccessDate
field.description: Last referral list access date

field.name: LastSubmissionListAccessDate
field.description: Last submission list access date

field.name: PreferredTimeZone
field.description: Contains the time zone selected by the candidate or agent. If the candidate or agent did not select a time zone, the system will use the time zone corresponding to the candidate's residence. If the residence has not been provided by the candidate, the system will take the time zone of the browser. Finally, if no time zone can deducted from the request, the default time zone (company setting) will be taken into account.

field.name: SendApplicationAcknowledgement
field.description: Determines if the Acknowledgement Letter must be sent to the candidate or not.

field.name: SendJobPostingNotification
field.description: Determines if the Job Posting Notification must be sent to the candidate or not. If yes, it takes the value of attribute "jobPostingNoticeFrequency" into account.

field.name: SendMyJobAgentsNotice
field.description: Determines if the Job Agent Notification(s) must be sent to the candidate or not. If yes, it takes the value of attribute "jobPostingNoticeFrequency" into account, unless it has been explicitly overridden in the job agent itself.

field.name: SendRejectionLetterNotice
field.description: Determines if the Rejection Letter (sent when a requisition is filled or canceled) must be sent to a candidate.

entity.name: TaleoTimeZone
entity.description: Timezone accordingly to the meridian you are living

field.name: Number
field.description: Unique identifier generated by system

field.name: TimezoneId
field.description: Identification of the timezone

entity.name: TypeOfInstitution
entity.description: This entity is a lookup representing the list of possible type of institution: for example: University, College, school, etc,,,

field.name: Code
field.description: The public identifier of the type of institution.

entity.name: UDSElement
entity.description: The UDSElement entity models user-defined selection elements. A selection element is a possible value of the selection (discrete value). A selection element may then be used as a UDF (user-defined field) value.

field.name: Active
field.description: Indicates if this selection element is active. An inactive element will normally be hidden in the user interface.

field.name: Code
field.description: An alphanumeric code that uniquely identifies the element.

field.name: Complete
field.description: Indicates if the selection element has all the required information entered. The required information is the description for all content languages. An incomplete element should not be shown in the UI.

field.name: CustomerID
field.description: The UDSElement internal identifier specified by the customer. Used for referencing a UDSElement identifier known in another external system for integration purposes.

field.name: Description
field.description: The descriptive name of the selection element.

field.name: EffectiveFrom
field.description: The date from element takes effect, if any. The effectiveFrom and effectiveTill fields are considered by the system only if their parent selection enables effective dates.

field.name: EffectiveUntil
field.description: The date the element becomes inactive, if any.

field.name: LastModifiedDate
field.description: The last modification date of the UDSElement

field.name: Number
field.description: The unique identifier of this entity.

field.name: Sequence
field.description: The default display sequence of the element.

relation.name: JobFields
relation.description: JobFields for which this selection element is active.

relation.name: Locations
relation.description: Locations for which this selection element is active.

relation.name: Organizations
relation.description: Organizations for which this selection element is active.

relation.name: UserDefinedSelection
relation.description: Indicates in which selection this element belongs. That selection's attributes influence how an element is to be used and displayed in the user interface.
