entity.name: UserAccount
entity.description: The userAccount is the authentication entity that defines a system user

field.name: AccountCreationDate
field.description: Account creation date

field.name: AccountEndValidity
field.description: The account validity end date

field.name: AccountStartValidity
field.description: The account validity start date

field.name: ForceChangePassword
field.description: Indicates whether the user must change his or her password at next login.

field.name: LastPasswordModification
field.description: Last date when the user changed his or her password.

field.name: Loginname
field.description: The user's login name

relation.name: AccountStatus
relation.description: The user account status

relation.name: Groups
relation.description: User accounts that belongs to this group

relation.name: OLFCoverageAreas
relation.description: To be documented.

entity.name: UserDefinedSelection
entity.description: The UserDefinedSelection entity models user-defined selections. A selection (domain of discrete values) may then be used to define user-defined fields.

field.name: Code
field.description: Alphanumeric code that uniquely identifies the selection.

field.name: CustomerID
field.description: The UserDefinedSelection internal identifier specified by the customer. Used for referencing a UserDefinedSelection identifier known in another external system for integration purposes.

field.name: EffectiveDatingEnabled
field.description: Indicates if the elements of this selection can specify an activation period. If this field is set to false, any dates in the 'effectiveFrom' and 'effectiveTill' fields of the elements will not be considered.

field.name: Large
field.description: Indicates that this selection handles a large amount of elements.

field.name: Name
field.description: Descriptive name of the selection.

field.name: Number
field.description: The unique identifier of this entity.

field.name: OLFLinkingMandatory
field.description: Indicates if all elements of this selection must be linked to at least one structure element.

field.name: OLFMetaClass
field.description: The meta-class of one of the following: Organization, Location, JobField. Elements linked to this selection must only be linked to that type of structure.

relation.name: Elements
relation.description: Contains the elements of this selection.

relation.name: Origin
relation.description: Indicates the origin of this selection (either built in by Taleo, or company-specific data).

relation.name: RequiredLanguages
relation.description: Indicates which languages are required to make this user-defined selection complete.

entity.name: UserType
entity.description: User Roles are sets of Functional Permissions that can be attributed to Users.

entity.name: WillingnessToTravel
entity.description: Will Travel lookup values. It determines the person's likeliness to travel.

field.name: Value
field.description: This a value associated to a WillTravel record used for computation.

entity.name: WillRelocate
entity.description: Will Relocate lookup values. It determines the level of interest for a person in beeing relocated.

field.name: Code
field.description: The unique code of this enumeration value.

entity.name: WorkCondition
entity.description: This class represents the work conditions in the houlry world of the candidate. ( Job Shift class is similar in the professional world)

field.name: AvailableHolidays
field.description: The field set if the candidate is willing to work on holidays.

field.name: AvailableWeekends
field.description: The field set if the candidate is willing to work on weekends.

field.name: HourlyPayRateExpected
field.description: The field set the amount of money expected based on a hourly pay rate.

relation.name: HourlyPayRateCurrency
relation.description: This relation define the pay rate currency for the current workconditions.

relation.name: HoursPerWeekPreferred
relation.description: The field set the number of hours the candidate prefered to work per week. The possible values are defined in the WorkConditionHourLevel class.

relation.name: HoursPerWeekWilling
relation.description: The field set the number of hours the candidate is willing to work per week. The possible values are defined in the WorkConditionHourLevel class.

entity.name: WorkConditionHourLevel
entity.description: This class is a lookup to display the value of the following fields. - WorkingCondition - hoursPerWeekWilling - WorkingCondition - hoursPerWeekPreferred

entity.name: WorkItem
entity.description: A work item represents a task that is assigned to a user of the Taleo system.

field.name: Comment
field.description: A comment entered by the user who created the work item.

field.name: CreationDate
field.description: The date and time the work item was created.

relation.name: Assignee
relation.description: The user to whom this workitem is assigned.

relation.name: Originator
relation.description: The user who created the workitem.

relation.name: ResumeState
relation.description: The state of the work item before being put on hold.

relation.name: State
relation.description: The current state of the work item.

relation.name: Type
relation.description: The type of work item.

entity.name: WorkItemCategory
entity.description: Defines categories in which work items can be classified. Currently two categories exist: Assignable and Automatic.

entity.name: WorkItemState
entity.description: Defines states in which a work item can be. There are currently two possible states. Active, which indicates that the workitem is ready to be read and realized. This is the initial status. The second state is On Hold, which suspends a work item. For example, when a requisition is put on hold, all its related workitems are automatically put on hold. They are resumed as soon as the requisition is resumed.

entity.name: WorkItemType
entity.description: Defines the kinds of work items that exist in the Taleo system. Each type of work item is also associated to a category.

field.name: NextExpectedActionDescription
field.description: Describes the action that the user receiving this type of work item is expected to take.

relation.name: Category
relation.description: The category in which this work item type is classified.

entity.name: WorkLocation
entity.description: Represent the Work Location of the latest location level

field.name: Address1
field.description: the address of the work location

field.name: Address2
field.description: The address of the work location

field.name: City
field.description: the city of the work location

field.name: Code
field.description: the code of the work location
